## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release/install

## Stable Contract Impact

- [ ] No stable CLI, JSON, WebSocket, or HID contract changes
- [ ] Changes stable CLI behavior
- [ ] Changes stable JSON output
- [ ] Changes WebSocket/HID protocol
- [ ] Updates docs for any contract change

Reference: [docs/api-stability.md](https://github.com/namvox/simx/blob/main/docs/api-stability.md)

## Verification

Run the checks that apply:

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `simx doctor --json`
- [ ] Manual simulator/browser streaming check
